Hey there! jack is using Twitter.

Twitter is a free service that lets you keep in touch with people through the exchange of quick, frequent answers to one simple question: What are you doing? Join today to start receiving jack's updates.

Already using Twitter
from your phone? Click here.

jack

Happy New Year, Twitter. about 4 hours ago from txt
In a winebago. about 5 hours ago from txt
Champagne tasting on the roof about 7 hours ago from txt
Good day to pick up my champagne of the month club. 4 bottles to add to the 17. about 12 hours ago from txt
NYE 2007, Twitter was young, & I stayed home with a fever as I watched a daemon I wrote send New Year's nudges around the world at midnight. about 17 hours ago from Twitfire
Hello, San Francisco. 5:49 PM Dec 30th, 2008 from txt
Headed to the airport after breakfast at grandma's 6:27 AM Dec 30th, 2008 from txt
There's an entire universe in the smallest of things, even those mundane. I need a haircut. 6:54 PM Dec 29th, 2008 from txt
Sitting on a rocking chair in front of a bonfire, a lake, and an amber sunset. 3:12 PM Dec 28th, 2008 from txt
Eating toasted ravioli 6:06 PM Dec 27th, 2008 from txt
A hummingbird buzzed my ear as I was looking at a tree covered in epiphytes. 12:42 PM Dec 27th, 2008 from txt
At the botanical garden. It's 70 degrees, raining, and I'm the only one here under 60. 11:57 AM Dec 27th, 2008 from txt
Oban, a book, & a fire 8:39 PM Dec 26th, 2008 from txt
It was 5 degrees Sunday, it'll be 70 degrees tomorrow. I'm still in the same place. 7:42 PM Dec 26th, 2008 from txt
Wrapping gifts 10:13 AM Dec 24th, 2008 from txt
It's now 6 degrees f 9:28 PM Dec 21st, 2008 from txt
The daily cocktail for my birthday is a Milli Vanilli. Weak. 4:00 PM Dec 20th, 2008 from txt
I made a paperweight 9:40 PM Dec 19th, 2008 from txt
Now learning to blow glass 8:38 PM Dec 19th, 2008 from txt
At a glass blowing studio. Hot. 7:33 PM Dec 19th, 2008 from txt
